title: selago divaricata
intro: Selago divaricata, also known as Cape honeysuckle or bushman's tea, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selago divaricata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. It can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or used in other herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions.
